# Steps Widget Website

Steps Widget is a beautiful, privacy-first iPhone step counter widget supporting Home Screen, Lock Screen, Apple Health, and Apple Watch tracking.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz): Clean landing page promoting the app features and App Store links.
- [About](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/about): Information about the creators and the design principles of the app.
- [Blog](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog): Index page for guides and SEO articles on step tracking.

## Guides & Blog Articles
- [Best Step Counter Widget for iPhone](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/step-counter-widget-iphone): Guide on setting up and customizing step widgets on the Home Screen.
- [How to Show Steps on Your iPhone Lock Screen](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/iphone-lock-screen-steps-widget): Walkthrough on displaying dynamic progress rings directly on the iOS Lock Screen.
- [Apple Health Steps Widget for iPhone and Watch](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/apple-health-steps-widget): Details on how Apple Health consolidates background step counts from multiple devices.
- [How to Track Steps on iPhone Without an Apple Watch](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/track-steps-iphone-without-apple-watch): Guide on using the iPhone's built-in motion sensors to track steps automatically.
- [How to Design an Aesthetic Steps Widget Setup on Your iPhone](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/aesthetic-steps-widget-iphone-setup): Step-by-step layout design guide for customizing the home screen style and accents.
- [Pedometer Apps with Move Reminders: How to Stay Active on iPhone](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/blog/pedometer-app-with-move-reminders): Details on setting up alerts and notifications on the iPhone to break sedentary behavior.

## Legal Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/privacy): Details on our strict privacy-first, on-device only storage policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://steps.crazylazy.xyz/terms): Legal terms of service for the Steps Widget application.
